prompt_preview:
You are diagnosing a noisy production incident from logs.
Use only the evidence shown below.
Do not invent benchmark labels, hidden graph state, or symptoms that are not present.
Return only one raw JSON object with keys `diagnosis`, `repair_action`, and `evidence_phrases`.
`diagnosis` should be a concise plain-language root-cause statement.
`repair_action` should be a concise plain-language remediation.
`evidence_phrases` should be a short list of exact phrases copied from the evidence.

Dataset: OpenStack
Selected alert:
nova-compute.log.1.2017-05-16_13:55:31 2017-05-16 00:13:57.757 2931 INFO nova.compute.manager [req-6f9ecdfe-481c-4535-9bdc-45d86085d739 113d3a99c3da401fbd62cc2caa5b96d2 54fadb412c4e40cdbaed9335e4c35a9e - - -] [VM: c62f4f25-982c-4ea2-b5e4-93000edfcfbf] Took 20.03 seconds to spawn the VM on the hypervisor.
diagnosis: VM spawning on the hypervisor is taking excessively long (20.03 seconds), indicating a performance bottleneck during instance creation.
repair_action: Investigate hypervisor resource contention (CPU, memory, or disk I/O) and optimize the compute node performance to reduce VM spawn time.

Incident context:
nova-compute.log.1.2017-05-16_13:55:31 2017-05-16 00:13:57.747 2931 INFO nova.compute.manager [req-3ea4052c-895d-4b64-9e2d-04d64c4d94ab - - - - -] [VM: c62f4f25-982c-4ea2-b5e4-93000edfcfbf] lifecycle transition acknowledged after hypervisor state change
nova-compute.log.1.2017-05-16_13:55:31 2017-05-16 00:13:57.756 2931 INFO nova.virt.libvirt.driver [-] [VM: c62f4f25-982c-4ea2-b5e4-93000edfcfbf] Instance spawned successfully.
nova-compute.log.1.2017-05-16_13:55:31 2017-05-16 00:13:57.863 2931 INFO nova.compute.manager [req-3ea4052c-895d-4b64-9e2d-04d64c4d94ab - - - - -] [VM: c62f4f25-982c-4ea2-b5e4-93000edfcfbf] During runtime-state reconciliation the VM has a launch workflow still marked in-flight. Defer.
diagnosis: The VM launch workflow remained marked as in-flight during runtime-state reconciliation, causing a 20-second delay before the instance was successfully spawned.
repair_action: Monitor the reconciliation process for the specific VM ID; if the in-flight status persists, restart the nova-compute service to clear the stuck workflow state.
